items.name: OmniForge
items.description: OmniForge is a CLI by Omnionix for fine-tuning Hugging Face language models on local or Hub datasets, with notebook-safe workflows for local machines, Kaggle, and Colab. It supports LoRA/full fine-tuning, low-VRAM optimization paths, dataset preparation, evaluation, and export in one branded command-line tool.
